overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a fur cloak ascending a giant stone statue in a stormy, ash-filled environment. The character reaches the Forge of the Giants, overlooks a massive lava chasm, then enters a dark indoor corridor illuminated by firelight.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior ascent on giant stone hand statue

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the curved white surface of a giant stone hand toward a massive fortress structure

entered.detail: massive white stone hand forming a curved walkway with snow-covered surface
large dark stone building with ornate carvings and columns
dark purple stormy sky filled with floating red embers and particles

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the snow-covered surface of a massive stone hand statue, approaching an ancient fortress structure. The stormy sky above is filled with floating red embers, creating an ominous atmosphere as the character steadily ascends.

scene_state.functional_zone: climbing the face of a giant wolf statue

events.description: character begins climbing the vertical face of the giant wolf statue, transitioning from walking to scrambling upward

agents.ego_description: climbing up the side of a massive stone wolf head, moving from the hand structure to the summit platform above

entered.detail: enormous carved stone wolf head with open mouth, detailed eyes, and snow-covered surface

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from walking to climbing, scaling the face of a massive stone wolf statue. The ancient fortress wall recedes into the distance as the character ascends toward the summit, with the stormy ember-filled sky still visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: forge of the giants overlook with lava chasm

events.description: text 'Forge of the Giants' appears as character reaches the summit revealing a massive lava-filled chasm below
character walks along the cliff edge observing the glowing lava and embers rising from the chasm

agents.ego_description: standing at the edge of a massive chasm filled with molten lava, surveying the dramatic landscape and stormy sky

entered.detail: snow-covered stone platform at the summit with ornate carved edges
massive deep crevice filled with glowing red and orange molten lava

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the summit, the 'Forge of the Giants' is revealed—a massive platform overlooking a terrifying lava-filled chasm. The character walks along the edge, observing the glowing molten rock below while the stormy sky swirls with red embers above the cliff walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor temple corridor with fire lighting and organic roots

events.description: character enters a dark stone doorway transitioning from the outdoor forge to an indoor corridor
corridor illumination increases revealing wall-mounted fire sconces and hanging chandeliers

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark stone corridor that opens into a larger hall illuminated by warm firelight and covered in thick organic root structures

entered.detail: dark stone doorway marking the transition from exterior to interior
long hallway with ornate circular patterned stone floors and high ceilings
wall-mounted torches providing warm orange flickering light
ornate ceiling fixture with multiple flames hanging from chains
thick twisted roots and tendrils growing along the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark stone archway leaving the stormy exterior behind, transitioning into an indoor corridor. The space gradually illuminates with warm firelight from wall sconces and hanging chandeliers, revealing an ornate hall with thick organic roots creeping along the ancient stone walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a stormy, ash-filled exterior across massive stone monuments into a warm, firelit interior. It begins with the character walking along the snow-covered surface of a giant stone hand toward an ancient fortress under a sky swirling with red embers. As the character transitions from walking to climbing, the camera scales the face of a massive stone wolf statue, leaving the fortress walls behind to reach the summit. The scene then opens onto the Forge of the Giants, where the character walks along the edge of a terrifying lava-filled chasm beneath the ominous red sky. Finally, the camera follows the character through a dark stone archway, leaving the storm behind to enter an ornate indoor corridor illuminated by warm firelight and overgrown with thick organic roots.
